text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although her physical condition has previously
prevented her from getting the most out of
summer camp, Mejiro Ardan brims with
excitement as she believes things will be different
this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our sights set on our autumn goal, a red-hot
summer camp gets underway!
